name: ckerror-partial-failure
prompt: I'm getting CKErrorPartialFailure when syncing CKShare records — only some records save, others fail with 'server record changed'. iOS 26.
rationale: CKError is data-layer; CloudKit sync conflict resolution

name: swiftdata-cross-context-background
prompt: When a background notification arrives, my app tries to update SwiftData and crashes with 'Illegal attempt to establish a relationship between objects in different contexts.'
rationale: Threading bug expressed through persistence layer; needs both routers

name: swiftui-list-hot-device
prompt: My SwiftUI List with 200 items makes the device run hot and battery drains fast. Scrolling is fine but the device warms up after 10 minutes.

name: voiceover-picker-not-readable
prompt: My SwiftUI Picker with custom labels doesn't read correctly with VoiceOver — it says 'button' but skips my custom accessibilityLabel.

name: itms-91065-rejection
prompt: App Store rejected my submission with ITMS-91065: 'Missing signature on required reasons API.' What does this mean?
rationale: Privacy manifest / App Store submission issue

name: device-only-background-location-crash
prompt: My app crashes only on real device (works in simulator) when it tries to start CLLocationManager background updates after wake-from-sleep. iOS 26.

name: generable-nil-fields
prompt: My @Generable struct returns nil for half the fields when I call LanguageModelSession.respond(). Other fields are correct. iOS 26.2.

name: visionkit-subject-lift-fails
prompt: VisionKit subject lifting works on photos of people but fails completely on product photos with simple backgrounds. iOS 26.

name: languagemodelsession-freezes-ui
prompt: My LanguageModelSession freezes the UI when I call respond() on a long prompt. iOS 26.
rationale: Long generation blocks calling actor; AI + concurrency cross-suite

name: vision-on-capture-frames-12fps
prompt: I'm running VNDetectFaceRectanglesRequest on each AVCaptureSession frame and the preview drops to 12fps. iOS 26.
rationale: Vision processing + capture pipeline + performance triangle

name: swiftdata-cloudkit-serverrecordchanged
prompt: After enabling iCloud sync on my @Model, the app crashes with CKError(.serverRecordChanged) on every save. SwiftData with cloudkit configuration.
rationale: SwiftData + CloudKit both routed by axiom-data

name: task-modifier-stale-data
prompt: I'm calling Task { await loadData() } in the .task modifier but the view shows stale data after navigation. iOS 26 NavigationStack.

name: smartstack-widget-never-updates
prompt: Smart Stack widget on Apple Watch never updates. Build is clean, parent iOS app fires WidgetCenter.shared.reloadAllTimelines().

name: hkobserverquery-mainactor-crash
prompt: HKObserverQuery's update handler fires off-main and I'm getting _swift_task_checkIsolatedSwift when I touch @MainActor state. iOS 26.

name: avcapture-black-frames-device
prompt: AVCaptureSession returns black frames after the user grants camera permission. Works in simulator, fails on device on iOS 26.

name: voiceover-glass-button
prompt: VoiceOver doesn't announce the focused glass-effect button on iOS 26. It says 'button' but skips the label.
rationale: Accessibility primary; Liquid Glass design or SwiftUI secondary

name: mapkit-annotations-stop-clustering
prompt: MapKit annotations cluster correctly in iOS 17 but stop clustering on iOS 26. CLLocationManager updates are arriving.

name: spritekit-empty-scene-30fps
prompt: My SpriteKit physics simulation drops to 30fps on iPhone 13 mini even though the game is empty (no nodes). iOS 26.

name: appintent-not-in-shortcuts
prompt: My AppIntent never appears in Shortcuts.app even though I have @AppShortcut declarations. iOS 26 simulator and device.

name: concurrent-cannot-find-symbol
prompt: After updating Xcode 26.1, all my tests fail with 'cannot find symbol' for code that uses @concurrent. The build worked yesterday.
